title: Outer Catwalk
frame: +X east, +Z south, +Y up; north (mountain side) at -Z. Geometry is state-independent: day/night/unearthly differ only in sky+light, so one blockout serves all three states (relight on the clay).

parts.name: promontory + iron walkway disk
parts.detail: railless iron catwalk girdling the dome — its outer ring IS the walkway, edges drop straight off

parts.name: translucent dome
parts.detail: small pale translucent dome the catwalk circles

parts.name: round opening (ladder down) - south flank
parts.detail: round opening in the dome's south flank, ladder down inside

parts.name: iron steps to opening - south
parts.detail: few iron steps climbing the dome flank to the opening

parts.name: mountain cliff (north, across ravine)
parts.detail: the mountain rises massively close on the north side, separated from the promontory by a deep jagged ravine

parts.name: ledge on cliff face - north
parts.detail: tiny ledge just visible on the cliff face across the ravine

parts.name: valley floor far below
parts.detail: vast bright-green valley a long way down on the open side

parts.name: terraced garden below (south)
parts.detail: small terraced garden of knotted spiralled paths, just below the south edge

notes.catwalk-south: anchor (day). dome at left shoulder; iron steps + round opening on the dome; terraced garden and bright valley falling away on the open (right) side under unclouded blue afternoon sky.
notes.catwalk-north: the mountain cliff rises close across the deep ravine ahead; the tiny ledge sits on the cliff face. dome at your back/shoulder.
